The impact of deer exclusion or reduction to 7.5 and 15 deer · km-2
only plots in deer exclosures had a significantly different species composition than plots under intensive browsing
reduced deer densities favored plants with brightly colored flowers
a reduced density of 7.5 deer · km-2 was sufficient to induce significant changes in functional trait assemblages of regenerating stands
